message:
refactor(ui): replace imperative line-building with vec! literals in chart empty states

- Convert three empty-state placeholder renderers (explorer, heatmap,
  breakdowns) from push-based Vec construction to vec![] literals for
  more idiomatic and readable Rust
- Simplify single-span Line::from_spans calls to remove redundant
  vec![] wrapping where only one span exists
- UI app adjustments for refined analytics wiring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

                     " No analytics timeseries yet. If data exists, cass is rebuilding automatically.",

-                ),
-            ]));
+                )]),
+            ];
             Paragraph::new(ftui::text::Text::from_lines(lines)).render(area, frame);
             return;
